title: Great Learning is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Great Learning is Hiring: Subject Matter Expert (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Great Learning, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Subject Matter Expert for our Pimpri-Chinchwad operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Great Learning:
Great Learning is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain classroom discipline and create a positive learning environment
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Conduct doubt-clearing sessions and remedial classes for weak students
• Create curriculum-aligned learning materials and assessments
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Bloom's Taxonomy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in LMS Platforms
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Lesson Planning

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Great Learning!
